creator: steve@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Don't know exactly what is wrong here but without a patch I'm afraid 
we won't be able to be of much help.  You might try another CD, a 
different drive, a different controller, talking to wmcdplay's author, 
and maybe even updating your kernel sources to see if this problem has 
been fixed.  Thanks.
